source: Derived from standardMetaobjectDefinitionEnable round-trip captures against the disposable conformance shop; live definition instance IDs and timestamps are stripped.

templates.name: Question and Answer Pairs
templates.description: Question and answer pairs that describe a merchant's shop.

templates.name: Accessory size
templates.description: Defines the size of an accessory product, such as one size or compact

fieldDefinitions.name: Base accessory size
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: Age group
templates.description: Defines the target age range for a product, such as adults or kids

fieldDefinitions.name: Base age group
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: Battery type
templates.description: Distinguishes between types of batteries, such as disposable or rechargeable

fieldDefinitions.name: Base battery type
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: Color
templates.description: Defines the primary color or pattern, such as blue or striped

fieldDefinitions.name: Base color
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

fieldDefinitions.name: Base pattern
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: Fabric
templates.description: Identifies the type of fabric used in a product, for example, cotton or denim

fieldDefinitions.name: Base fabric
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: Finish
templates.description: Describes the surface quality of a product, like satin or matte

fieldDefinitions.name: Base finish
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: Flavor
templates.description: Specifies the taste or flavor of a product, e.g. vanilla, mint

fieldDefinitions.name: Base flavor
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: Jewelry material
templates.description: Identifies the main material used in jewelry items, such as gold or enamel

fieldDefinitions.name: Base jewelry material
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: Material
templates.description: Defines a product's primary material, such as cotton or wool

fieldDefinitions.name: Base material
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: Neckline
templates.description: Used to describe the neck shape of a garment, such as V-neck or boat

fieldDefinitions.name: Base neckline
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: Occasion
templates.description: Specifies the suitable event or setting for a product, e.g. casual, formal

fieldDefinitions.name: Base occasion
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: One-piece style
templates.description: Identifies the specific style of a one-piece garment, like a jumpsuit or romper

fieldDefinitions.name: Base one-piece style
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: Ring size
templates.description: Specifies the size of a ring, such as L or 6.5

fieldDefinitions.name: Base ring size
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: Shoe size
templates.description: Used to define the size of footwear, e.g. Extra large (XL), 9.5

fieldDefinitions.name: Base shoe size
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: Size
templates.description: Used to specify the size of a product, such as 0-3 months or Extra large (XL)

fieldDefinitions.name: Base size
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: Sleeve length type
templates.description: Specifies the style of sleeves on clothing items, such as short or sleeveless

fieldDefinitions.name: Base sleeve length type
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: Style
templates.description: Describes the style of a product, typically for window treatments; e.g. vertical blind, pleated shades

fieldDefinitions.name: Base style
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: Target gender
templates.description: Identifies the intended gender for a product, such as female, male or unisex

fieldDefinitions.name: Base target gender
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: Theme
templates.description: Describes the product's primary theme or motif, such as sport, space, or holidays

fieldDefinitions.name: Base theme
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: Toe style
templates.description: Defines the shape or design of a shoe's toe, such as open or pointed

fieldDefinitions.name: Base toe style
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: Top length type
templates.description: Defines the length of tops or shirts, like crop top or long

fieldDefinitions.name: Base top length type
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: Waist rise
templates.description: Indicates where on the waist a garment sits, like low, medium or high

fieldDefinitions.name: Base waist rise
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: Watch/Band material
templates.description: Specifies the type of material for watch bands, such as nylon or silicone

fieldDefinitions.name: Base watch/band material
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: Pants length type
templates.description: Used to defines the length of pants, such as cropped or long

fieldDefinitions.name: Base pants length type
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: Closure type
templates.description: Defines the method used to fasten or secure a product, such as zipper or buckles

fieldDefinitions.name: Base closure type
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization

templates.name: Fit type
templates.description: Describes the fit type for vehicle parts and accessories, like custom or universal

fieldDefinitions.name: Base fit type
fieldDefinitions.description: Base values map to standards for better search and organization
